name: Atenção > 25h apontadas
query: project = "HCM - Data Office" AND timespent > 25 AND status not in (Done, Closed) ORDER BY timespent DESC

name: Features para fechar
query: project = HCMDOF AND issuetype = Feature AND status not in (done, Closed) AND NOT issueFunction in linkedIssuesOf("project = HCMDOF and status not in (Done, closed)") AND issueFunction in linkedIssuesOf("project = HCMDOF and status in (Done)")

name: Entrega não informada
query: project = "HCM - Data Office" AND Entrega = "Entrega \\ Não Informada"

name: RTD Estourado
query: project = "HCM - Data Office" AND "Lead Time Ready to Deploy" >= 2 AND status not in (Done, Closed)

name: Sem feature
query: project = "HCM - Data Office" AND issueFunction not in linkedIssuesOf("issuetype = Feature", "é Vinculada à") AND issuetype not in (Epic, Tradução, Feature, Programação, Pesquisa, "Teste em par", Documentação, Discovery) AND (labels is EMPTY OR labels not in (Sustentação))

name: Sem épico informado
query: project = HCMDOF AND "Epic Link" is EMPTY AND issuetype != Epic AND issuetype not in (Tradução, "Teste em par", Programação, Documentação, Discovery, Pesquisa)

name: HCMDOF sem tipo de repasse interno na feature
query: project = HCMDOF AND issuetype = Feature AND "Tipo de repasse interno" is EMPTY ORDER BY cf[10000] ASC

name: HCMDOF épico sem tipo de demanda
query: project = "HCM - Data Office" AND "Type of demand" is EMPTY

name: Issue de cliente
query: project = "HCM - Data Office" AND TicketZendesk is not EMPTY AND status in (Backlog, "To Do")

name: Issue de tradução em backlog
query: project = "HCM - Data Office" AND issuetype = Tradução AND status = Backlog
